Container.Name: Fresharr
Container.Overview: Fresharr discovers new and highly rated movies and TV shows from Rotten Tomatoes (and optionally TMDB) and automatically adds them to Radarr and Sonarr. Set minimum score thresholds, run it on a schedule, and let your library grow with well-reviewed releases. Start with DRY_RUN=true to preview what it would add before letting it loose.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Stores Fresharr's state file (which titles were already added).

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Radarr instance. Leave empty to disable movie handling.

Config.Name: Radarr API Key
Config.Description: Radarr > Settings > General > API Key

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Sonarr instance. Leave empty to disable TV handling.

Config.Name: Sonarr API Key
Config.Description: Sonarr > Settings > General > API Key

Config.Name: Sources
Config.Description: Comma-separated discovery sources: rottentomatoes, tmdb (tmdb requires an API key).

Config.Name: Minimum Critics Score
Config.Description: Only take Rotten Tomatoes titles with at least this Tomatometer score (0-100).

Config.Name: Minimum Audience Score
Config.Description: Only take Rotten Tomatoes titles with at least this audience score (0-100, 0 = ignore).

Config.Name: Dry Run
Config.Description: true = only log what would be added, don't touch Radarr/Sonarr. Set to false once you're happy with the results.

Config.Name: Run Interval (hours)
Config.Description: How often to check for new titles.

Config.Name: Max Items Per Run
Config.Description: Safety cap on how many titles are added in a single run.

Config.Name: TMDB API Key
Config.Description: Free API key from themoviedb.org - only needed if Sources includes tmdb.

Config.Name: TMDB Minimum Rating
Config.Description: Minimum TMDB rating 0-10 (tmdb source only).

Config.Name: Radarr Quality Profile
Config.Description: Quality profile name or id. Empty = Radarr's first profile.

Config.Name: Radarr Root Folder
Config.Description: Root folder path as configured in Radarr. Empty = first root folder.

Config.Name: Sonarr Quality Profile
Config.Description: Quality profile name or id. Empty = Sonarr's first profile.

Config.Name: Sonarr Root Folder
Config.Description: Root folder path as configured in Sonarr. Empty = first root folder.

Config.Name: Minimum Year
Config.Description: Ignore titles released before this year (empty = no limit).

Config.Name: RT Movie Lists
Config.Description: Comma-separated Rotten Tomatoes browse list paths for movies (the part of the URL after /browse/).

Config.Name: RT TV Lists
Config.Description: Comma-separated Rotten Tomatoes browse list paths for TV.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING or ERROR.
